niche: Luxury coastal real estate and relocation support
targetAudience: Affluent buyers relocating to Charleston who want a polished local advisor with strong negotiation instincts
offer: Relocation strategy, home search guidance, and luxury listing representation
goals: Increase consultation requests, build trust before the first call, and turn market expertise into consistent inbound interest
tone: Luxury editorial with calm concierge confidence
keyThemes: Market clarity, relocation planning, neighborhood fit, luxury property positioning, client wins
extraContext: Primary market is Charleston, SC. Relevant details include waterfront homes, walkable historic neighborhoods, turnkey interiors, and private outdoor space.
